author: John.gr.keojosks
title: Can't handle load
content: I have a 1700 file music library, every time I open the app it takes 5 minutes to load them. The moment I change the sorting it takes another 5 to load them again. It can't handle big loads.

author: Bakosthegravitonman
title: Album covers
content: Enjoying the app for over a year now,the last update ruined covers,i can't download anything anymore,the only way to add a cover is manually.

author: Kylesoul
title: It’s been good, but…
content: Since a recent update the sound gets abruptly cut for a second eight seconds before the end of a track. Very annoying. Please, fix it.

author: Apostolos M
title: Car play
content: It is possible to start automatically when connecting with CarPlay?

author: Wrangler11
title: Issue report 04/02/2024
content: When I connect my iPhone with my Bluetooth device (Cardo pack talk bold helmet communicator) the play button spins infinitely saying “loading” .Then I have to close the app and start it again to make the player work.That issue appeared with the latest update.

author: foxyanime🦊
title: It’s a really good app but..
content: I use this app for a year now and it worked pretty good for me until some weeks ago when for some reason it started skipping some parts of the songs when I wasn’t in the app. Can you please fix it or tell me how to fix it?

author: blink🖤💖12
title: Amazing
content: Well, this app has saved me and I love it so much!!! Anyways I would prefer to be able to edit audio tags cuz most of the time it shows other album covers and stuff

author: zafirismoican
title: Scrolling issue
content:
When I listen to music, I can’t move the cursor to the minute of the song I want. 
When I am doing it, the song changes. 
Why?

author: loveS2K
title: Please FIX IT!
content: I use this app for about 2 months now. It was all gd until yesterday. I decided to import some songs. Ok everything good here. But when i play any of the new songs and i try to manually adjust the time of play of a song (lets say i want to skip first 20 seconds of a song) it will skip the entire song and go to the next one instead of skiping to the point i wanted. Instead of skiping time in a song, it skips the whole song and goew to the next one. Very disappointed, either fix it or let us know to uninstall it.

author: JohnnyAlexiou
title: Problem
content: Wtf is wrong with this app???? I’m using it two years now and something happened three days now and it crashes all the time I can’t do anything !!

author: marlborough1
title: Great music player
content: I wanted a music player to have crossfade and for that reason I’m very satisfied.

author: Dinoos
title: It’s ok
content: But crossfade doesn’t work for me. I’m playing music from my library on the same device. Crossfade button is enabled, changed the seconds, restarted app but nothing.

author: Bozz&Quark
title: Great app works perfectly
content: It is a great application, it works well every time. I absolutely love it because I can have my music anywhere! And by music I mean all my tracks and even recordings I have in my computer, not just the songs available in music store.
